sections.paragraph:
- Original: Βεελζεβούλ

- Transliteration: Beelzeboul

- Phonetic: beh-el-zeb-ool'

- Definition: Beelzebub = "lord of the house"

1. a name of Satan, the prince of evil spirits

- Origin: of Aramaic origin [by parody on H1176]

- TDNT entry: 11:05,1

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Of Chaldee origin (by parody upon [H1176]); dung God; Beelzebul a name of Satan: - Beelzebub.
